subscription.name: OpenAI Pro
subscription.notes: User reported paying $200/month for Codex/OpenAI Pro usage.

measurement_window.notes: The weekly start is 7 days before the UI reset time. The end is when the local calculation was taken.

remote_hermes_steveclaw.notes: Hermes sessions crossing the weekly boundary were prorated by assistant-message ratio after the reset.

remote_codex_steveclaw.notes: Remote .codex usage was negligible compared with local and Hermes usage.

fast_assumption.notes: Fast multiplier was treated as a quota-consumption assumption.

errors.notes: Tool error rate was estimated from local function_call_output events with non-zero process exit codes. Model/API errors were not detected in assistant messages for the sampled window.

assumptions: API-equivalent value is not OpenAI's real cost.
Official GPT-5.5 prices were used as the fixed model baseline.
The weekly limit percentage came from the user's UI screenshot/text.
Remote Hermes data was included because the user indicated it also consumed limits.
Logs from machines not included in the scan are not represented.
